languages.text: {n}Долгие мгновения проходят, прежде чем Себериан вновь приходит в движение. Из вокс-решетки звучит резонирующий, похожий на рычание, приказ:{/n} "Архмилитант, бойцы, оставайтесь здесь и прикройте наш тыл. Наследни{mf|к|ца}, ступайте за мной. Пришло время мерзкому ксеносу Тразину ответить за злые козни против нашего рода".

traits.locale_text: [драфт] Архимилитант, бойцы — оставайтесь здесь, прикройте наш тыл, пока мы откручиваем металлическую голову Тразина. Настало время ксеносу ответить за все свои козни против нашего рода. ЭТО НУЖНАЯ РЕПЛИКА, НЕ УДАЛЯЙТЕ В ПУЛЕ ДРАФТОВ

languages.text: {n}Long moments pass before Seberian moves again. A rough, almost growling, command issues from the vox-grille:{/n} "Arch-Militant, soldiers, remain here and secure our rear. Follow me, my heir. It is time for the foul xenos Trazyn to answer for the wicked schemes he has wrought against our house."
languages.original_text: {n}Долгие мгновения проходят, прежде чем Себериан вновь приходит в движение. Из вокс-решетки звучит резонирующий, похожий на рычание, приказ:{/n} "Архмилитант, бойцы, оставайтесь здесь и прикройте наш тыл. Наследни{mf|к|ца}, ступайте за мной. Пришло время мерзкому ксеносу Тразину ответить за злые козни против нашего рода".

traits.locale_text: {n}Long moments pass before Seberian moves again. A resonant, almost growling command issues from the vox-grille:{/n} "Arch-Militant, fighters, remain here and secure our rear. Heir, follow me. It is time for the foul xenos Trazyn to answer for the wicked schemes he has wrought against our house."

{n}Long moments pass before Seberian moves again. A resonant, almost growling command issues from the vox-grille:{/n} "Arch-Militant, fighters, remain here and secure our rear. Heir, follow me. It is time for the foul xenos Trazyn to answer for the wicked schemes he has wrought against our house."

{n}Long moments pass before Seberian moves again. A rough, almost growling, command issues from the vox-grille:{/n} "Arch-Militant, soldiers, remain here and secure our rear. Follow me, my heir. It is time for the foul xenos Trazyn to answer for the wicked schemes he has wrought against our house."

{n}Long moments pass before Seberian moves again. A rough, almost growling, command issues from the vox-grille:{/n} "Arch-Militant, soldiers, remain here and secure our rear. Follow me, my heir. It is time for the foul xenos Trazyn to answer for the wicked schemes he has wrought against our house."

languages.text: {n}Nach einer gefühlten Ewigkeit bewegt sich Seberian wieder. Ein rauer, beinahe geknurrter Befehl ertönt aus seinem Vox-Gitter:{/n} "{nc|Erzmilitantin|Erzmilitant}, Soldaten, wartet hier und sichert unseren Rückzug. Folgt mir, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Es wird Zeit, dass der verfluchte Xenos Trazyn für all die Schandtaten büßt, die er unserem Haus angetan hat."
languages.original_text: {n}Long moments pass before Seberian moves again. A rough, almost growling, command issues from the vox-grille:{/n} "Arch-Militant, soldiers, remain here and secure our rear. Follow me, my heir. It is time for the foul xenos Trazyn to answer for the wicked schemes he has wrought against our house."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach einer gefühlten Ewigkeit bewegt sich Seberian wieder. Ein rauer, beinahe geknurrter Befehl ertönt aus seinem Vox-Gitter:{/n} "{nc|Erzmilitantin|Erzmilitant}, Soldaten, wartet hier und sichert unseren Rückzug. Folgt mir, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Es wird Zeit, dass der verfluchte Xenos Trazyn für all die Schandtaten büßt, die er unserem Haus angetan hat."

languages.text: {n}Seberian reste immobile un long moment, après quoi un ordre sort brutalement de sa grille-vox, presque comme un grognement :{/n} « Archimilitant, soldats, restez ici et sécurisez l'arrière. Mon {mf|héritier|héritière}, avec moi. Il est temps pour l'ignoble xénos Trazyn de payer pour les plans machiavéliques qu'il a manigancés contre notre maison. »
languages.original_text: {n}Long moments pass before Seberian moves again. A rough, almost growling, command issues from the vox-grille:{/n} "Arch-Militant, soldiers, remain here and secure our rear. Follow me, my heir. It is time for the foul xenos Trazyn to answer for the wicked schemes he has wrought against our house."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian reste immobile un long moment, après quoi un ordre sort brutalement de sa grille-vox, presque comme un grognement :{/n} « Archimilitant, soldats, restez ici et sécurisez l'arrière. Mon {mf|héritier|héritière}, avec moi. Il est temps pour l'ignoble xénos Trazyn de payer pour les plans machiavéliques qu'il a manigancés contre notre maison. »

languages.text: {n}Pasan unos largos momentos hasta que Seberian vuelve a moverse. Una orden seca, casi un gruñido, surge de su rejilla de voco:{/n} «Archimilitante, soldados, permanezcan aquí para asegurar nuestra retaguardia. Sígame, hereder{mf|o|a}. Es hora de que el sucio xenos Trazyn responda por sus terribles conspiraciones contra nuestra casa».
languages.original_text: {n}Long moments pass before Seberian moves again. A rough, almost growling, command issues from the vox-grille:{/n} "Arch-Militant, soldiers, remain here and secure our rear. Follow me, my heir. It is time for the foul xenos Trazyn to answer for the wicked schemes he has wrought against our house."

traits.locale_text: {n}Pasan unos largos momentos hasta que Seberian vuelve a moverse. Una orden seca, casi un gruñido, surge de su rejilla de voco:{/n} «Archimilitante, soldados, permanezcan aquí para asegurar nuestra retaguardia. Sígame, hereder{mf|o|a}. Es hora de que el sucio xenos Trazyn responda por sus terribles conspiraciones contra nuestra casa».

languages.text: {n}Seberian yeniden hareket etmeden önce saniyeler geçiyor. Voks ızgarasından pürüzlü, neredeyse hırlamaya benzer bir emir yükseliyor.{/n} "Başmilitan, askerler... Burada kalın ve arkamızı güvene alın. Beni takip et vârisim. Trazyn denen iğrenç zenonun, hanedanlığımıza karşı kurduğu kötü planların hesabını verme zamanı geldi."
languages.original_text: {n}Long moments pass before Seberian moves again. A rough, almost growling, command issues from the vox-grille:{/n} "Arch-Militant, soldiers, remain here and secure our rear. Follow me, my heir. It is time for the foul xenos Trazyn to answer for the wicked schemes he has wrought against our house."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian yeniden hareket etmeden önce saniyeler geçiyor. Voks ızgarasından pürüzlü, neredeyse hırlamaya benzer bir emir yükseliyor.{/n} "Başmilitan, askerler... Burada kalın ve arkamızı güvene alın. Beni takip et vârisim. Trazyn denen iğrenç zenonun, hanedanlığımıza karşı kurduğu kötü planların hesabını verme zamanı geldi."

languages.text: {n}过了许久，塞贝里安才重新有了动作。音阵格栅中传出一道粗哑、近乎低吼的命令：{/n}“首席战士，众士兵们，留在此地守住后方。随我来，我的继承人。是时候让卑鄙的异形特拉金，为他施于我们家族的毒计付出代价了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Long moments pass before Seberian moves again. A rough, almost growling, command issues from the vox-grille:{/n} "Arch-Militant, soldiers, remain here and secure our rear. Follow me, my heir. It is time for the foul xenos Trazyn to answer for the wicked schemes he has wrought against our house."

traits.locale_text: {n}过了许久，塞贝里安才重新有了动作。音阵格栅中传出一道粗哑、近乎低吼的命令：{/n}“首席战士，众士兵们，留在此地守住后方。随我来，我的继承人。是时候让卑鄙的异形特拉金，为他施于我们家族的毒计付出代价了。”

languages.text: {n}セベリアンが再び動き出すまで、長い時間が経過した。ボクスグリルから、うなり声にも似た荒々しい命令が発せられる：{/n}「アーチ＝ミリタント、兵士たち、ここに留まり、後方を守れ。アーチ＝ミリタント、兵士たちはここに留まり、我々の後方を守れ。アーチ・ミリタント、兵士たちよ、ここに留まり、後方を守れ、私の後継者よ」。
languages.original_text: {n}Long moments pass before Seberian moves again. A rough, almost growling, command issues from the vox-grille:{/n} "Arch-Militant, soldiers, remain here and secure our rear. Follow me, my heir. It is time for the foul xenos Trazyn to answer for the wicked schemes he has wrought against our house."

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンが再び動き出すまで、長い時間が経過した。ボクスグリルから、うなり声にも似た荒々しい命令が発せられる：{/n}「アーチ＝ミリタント、兵士たち、ここに留まり、後方を守れ。アーチ＝ミリタント、兵士たちはここに留まり、我々の後方を守れ。アーチ・ミリタント、兵士たちよ、ここに留まり、後方を守れ、私の後継者よ」。
